_comment: SPDX-License-Identifier: PMPL-1.0-or-later
Wikidata entity creation for K9 (Self-Validating Components)
Submission instructions:
Option A: QuickStatements (recommended for new entities)
1. Go to https://quickstatements.toolforge.org/
2. Log in with your Wikidata account
3. Paste the QuickStatements commands from the 'quickstatements' field below
4. Click 'Do it'
5. Record the resulting Q-number
Option B: Manual creation
1. Go to https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Special:NewItem
2. Enter the label, description, and aliases
3. Add each statement from the 'statements' section below
4. Add sitelinks if applicable
Option C: Wikidata API (wbeditentity)
Use the 'api_payload' field below with the Wikidata API
Endpoint: https://www.wikidata.org/w/api.php?action=wbeditentity&new=item
Prerequisites:
- A Wikidata account with autoconfirmed status (4+ days, 50+ edits)
- Published specification at a stable URL
- IANA media type registration (pending or approved)
Note on Q-numbers:
Q125652882 is a placeholder for the developer entity.
If Jonathan D.A. Jewell does not yet have a Wikidata item,
create one first and substitute the correct Q-number.
quickstatements: LAST	Den	"self-validating component format with Nickel contracts and tiered security levels"

P178_developer.note: If Q-number does not exist for the developer, create a Wikidata item first or use a string value

P2283_uses.note: Look up Q-number for Nickel language; may need to create it
Look up Q-number for Just; may need to create it

P527_has_parts.note: The K9 Leash System has three security levels. These could be modeled as separate items or qualifiers:

levels.name: Kennel
levels.description: Pure data level, no execution, safe in all environments

levels.name: Yard
levels.description: Validation level, Nickel contract evaluation permitted

levels.name: Hunt
levels.description: Full execution level, requires cryptographic signature

descriptions.en: self-validating component format with Nickel contracts and tiered security levels
descriptions.de: selbstvalidierendes Komponentenformat mit Nickel-Verträgen und gestuften Sicherheitsebenen
descriptions.fr: format de composant auto-validant avec contrats Nickel et niveaux de sécurité échelonnés
descriptions.es: formato de componente autovalidante con contratos Nickel y niveles de seguridad escalonados
descriptions.ja: Nickel契約と階層セキュリティレベルを持つ自己検証コンポーネント形式
